name: Chocolate Spiders
recipeInstructions:
Place the chocolate morsels in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil in the bottom pan.
Reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts. Add the noodles and peanuts, stirring well.
Drop the chocolate mixture by spoonfuls onto greased baking sheets. Refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
Keep chilled until ready to serve. Yield: about 3 dozen.
